creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194839
py-more-itertools-4.2.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-iter-tools to 4.2.0 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/erikrose/more-itertools/compare/4.0.1...4.2.0

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- added RUN_DEPENDS
- added test target


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

make test results for py27:
> Ran 324 tests in 0.297s
> 
> OK

make test results for py36:
> Ran 323 tests in 0.346s
> 
> OK
